name: Cangzhou Dahua Co., Ltd.
summary: Cangzhou Dahua Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells chemical fertilizers and carbimides in China. It offers synthetic ammonia, urea, hydrochloric acid, toluene-diisocyanate, and concentrated nitric acid. The company also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Japan, and South Korea. Cangzhou Dahua Co., Ltd. was founded in 1974 and is based in Cangzhou, China.
